race.comment: FUTURE FRANKIE (8) resumed over 1500m at Ballarat and needed the outing. Brought strong relative form to that and three back raced over a middle distance at Group 3 level. Has the ability and some gear tweaks, and this looks winnable with the extra fitness. IDEAS GALORE (9) settled back from a wide gate and found the line well beaten 1.3L over 1600m at Swan Hill. Third up now and she has winning claims. PITMAN (3) switched from Ciaron Maher and was taken to Hobart, where she failed to feature in the 2200m Listed Tasmanian Derby. Has been freshened since and jumped out. His Maiden form prior this distance range would see him in the finish. LIBBY ANN (6) improved last start over 1563m at Mt Gambier, beaten just a nose. Maps well and has to be considered over the longer journey. SNITZEL VON KIRK (4) is third-up and showing enough to keep onside.
